key.name: clash-host
key.description: The host address of Clash RESTful API

key.name: clash-port
key.description: The port of Clash RESTful API

key.name: clash-secret
key.description: The authentication secret for Clash API

key.name: proxy-port-http
key.description: The HTTP proxy port of Clash

key.name: proxy-port-socks
key.description: The SOCKS5 proxy port of Clash
